2077232822943895900.full_text:
🚨 MOHAMMAD KAIF ON INDIA WIN AGAINST ENGLAND 1ST ODI, VIRAT KOHLI AND ROHIT SHARMA AFTER HUMILIATING T20I LOSS🚨

Mohammad Kaif said 🗣️,

"There was a new energy as well. The seniors returned. In the T20Is, neither Shubman Gill, nor Rohit Sharma, nor Virat Kohli were there. Bumrah was also not there—and Bumrah is a big factor if we talk about today's match.
So, the return of the seniors—and I’m not saying just that Virat Kohli scored runs or Rohit Sharma scored runs—but their presence on the ground. The first thing I noticed was the energy. Virat Kohli is standing at covers, diving, talking, saying 'come on, we have to fight.' He is talking about the hurdles. So, the presence of the seniors, those three or four who returned for this match, it has made a difference.
Gill is a very strong ODI batter. His score in every match is consistent, he has an average of 60, he has scored a double century. His captaincy is also improving, he led his team to the finals in the IPL, and he is in good form with the bat.
So, all these things, along with the return of Bumrah—it has benefited us in this match. Whether we won the match comfortably or not, the combination of seniors and juniors helps you move forward, and that is what happened in today's match." [Cricbuzz]

2077212793942716767.full_text:
SHUBMAN GILL ON WIN AGAINST ENGLAND 1ST ODI:

Shubman Gill: "I was really pleased with the way we bowled in the middle overs. We bowled in the right areas early on when the ball was doing a bit. Although they put us under pressure towards the end of the powerplay, I thought the way we bounced back and took those five wickets was outstanding."

🚨 BREKING NEWS 🚨

According to reports, MS Dhoni could become Team India's mentor for the 2027 ODI World Cup. Recently, Dhoni has been spotted watching India's matches from the stands, fueling speculation. Reports claim the BCCI approached him, and Dhoni said he would first observe a few games before deciding. The BCCI is also reportedly covering his travel and related expenses.
